data: {"generalSituation":"The trough of low pressure now affecting the coast of Guangdong will weaken in the next couple of days. The weather will be brighter over the region. An easterly airstream will bring one or two rain patches to the coastal areas of Guangdong midweek this week. An anticyclone aloft will cover southern China in the latter part of this week to early next week. The weather will improve over the region. Meanwhile, under the influence of a southerly airstream, it will be hot during the day over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260406","week":"Monday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers. Isolated thunderstorms in the morning.
